publishedAbstract: * PG stuck in "`remapped`" or "`undersized`" or "`degraded`" and no recovery or backfill activity (See the Diagnostic section for `ceph status` example output).- Only 1 (or very few PGs) are in this state.- From the `io:` section of ceph status, there is no recovery activity.- The system may also be behind is scrubbing as newer versions of Ceph will not schedule scrubbing PGs unless those PGs are `active+clean`.
publishedTitle: Ceph: PG stuck in "remapped" or "undersized" or "degraded" and no recovery or backfill activity.
